summary_en: 1,129,400 ordinary shares cancelled (6.2% of issued shares). Post-cancellation issued share count: 16,979,205 shares. Effective date: 2026-05-29.
title_en: Notice of Completion of Treasury Share Cancellation
translation_en_brief: JANOME Corporation has completed the cancellation of 1,129,400 ordinary shares pursuant to Article 178 of the Companies Act of Japan. The cancellation was resolved by the Board of Directors on 2026-05-29 and became effective on the same date. The cancelled shares represented 6.2% of the total issued shares prior to cancellation. Following the cancellation, the company's total issued share count stands at 16,979,205 shares.
